creator: s.bilberry@gmail.com
text:
When the kernel is compiled with "options MROUTING" and mrouted daemon is
running (with default configuration) after some time (depends on multicast
traffic, I suppose, in my case from 40min till 4hrs) kernel traps. Always
at a fixed virtual address (0x65726624 in my case).

A side note: when a trap happens, a CPU-consuming task was running all the
time (distributed.net client in my case). The host is also running
gmirror+gjournal on 1Tb volume with samba and NFS and also rtorrent client.

How-To-Repeat: Backtrace:
